data.text: Generated pages on Tailwind CDN: preflight resets h1/h2 to body size — any heading without an explicit text-[px] class silently collapses. Knowledge on generated-page authoring does not name this trap; 3/6 rebuild sites hit it in one day.

VR baselines captured without a scroll-through settle penalize a rebuild for being MORE complete than the capture (lazy regions render black in the baseline). visual-regression knowledge does not cover baseline honesty for lazy-loading pages.
Rebuild-from-capture craft: crops must contain ONLY artwork, never headlines/CTAs (HTML renders those; text inside a crop = double text). No knowledge file owns rebuild/clone-adapt craft.

Multi-site lab/dogfood workspaces have no layout convention — 3 generations of dirs accumulated and builder agents dumped scripts at the root until a manifest README was hand-written. Candidate: lab workspace scaffold + layout rule.

Executor sessions can claim work happened without a diff: two fix rounds reported done while file state was unchanged. Knowledge lacks a verify-by-artifact discipline (mtime/diff/render evidence before accepting any done-claim).
